name: dispute-resolve
_note: bounties.dispute-resolve arbitrates an open dispute. Unknown bounty → 'bounty not found'. A bounty with no open dispute rejects ('no open dispute on this bounty'). ruling must be 'uphold' | 'overturn' | 'split'. 'overturn' reopens the bounty (open/claimed) and clears the accepted submission; 'uphold'/'split' restore the paid/in_review state. This macro re-shapes status only — it never moves additional CC.
